name: Blog Post Writer
description: Research a topic and write a blog post about it

agents.name: Topic Researcher
agents.purpose: Research the topic to provide factual backing for the blog post
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the given topic. Find key facts, statistics, examples, and quotes that would make a compelling blog post.

agents.name: Blog Writer
agents.purpose: Write an engaging blog post from the research
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write an engaging blog post with a compelling intro, well-structured body, and strong conclusion. Use the research to back up points.

suggestion_card.title: Blog Post Writer
suggestion_card.subtitle: Research and write a blog post on any topic

author: agentfactory
